features.name: inout_port_array_indexed_by_genvar_in_generate
features.description: Code should include an inout port array that is indexed by a genvar variable inside a generate for loop

features.name: tristate_buffer_instantiation_with_array_ports
features.description: Code should include a tristate buffer (IOBUF) module instantiation where the port signals are arrays and the IO port is inout

features.name: array_element_tristate_assignment_in_generate
features.description: Code should include a generate block with an inout wire array where individual elements are assigned using tristate (1'bz) logic
